title: stelis punoensis
intro: Stelis punoensis is a species of orchid native to Peru. It is known for its unique medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various conditions such as wound infections, gastrointestinal issues, and respiratory problems. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Stelis punoensis involve decoctions or infusions made from its roots or leaves, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
